## Anchors Against Food Deserts: Gravity Model of Atlanta's Grocery Network
**Invest Atlanta · Emory Center for AI Learning · 2025**

*With Lorayne Gulbrandsen, Jessica (Jiayi) Wang, Alice Xu*

Identified "hero stores" — grocery retailers most critical to preventing food deserts —
using a gravity-weighted demand model across Atlanta tax parcels. Built for Invest Atlanta
to support grant prioritization decisions.

**Methods:** Gravity model with inverse-square distance decay, Gaussian kernel density
estimation, capture rate normalization. Top hero store: Eat Right Atlanta – Emory Midtown
(contribution score: 9,517).

**Tools:** Python · GeoPandas · Folium · contextily · NumPy · pandas · matplotlib

```{=html}
<iframe src="assets/papers/Group2AIdatalab_Poster.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"
style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```

[Download Poster](assets/papers/Group2AIdatalab_Poster.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-sm}
